name: designer-portfolio
description: Futuristic portfolio website for UI/UX designers

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Designer
